caption: A person's hands hold a sports card, which features a signature and the name "JIM RICE," above a table covered with a palm tree patterned cloth. The background includes a white stand holding other items and a computer monitor. On the screen, a man wearing a blue shirt and a headset is visible in a smaller window. Overlaid text includes the logo "JASPYS" and the URL "CASEBREAKS.COM." As the scene progresses, the person moves the card toward a clear plastic protective sleeve. By the end of the sequence, the card is partially inserted into the sleeve, obscuring some of the view of the table and the on-screen content. The man in the inset window remains in the same position, watching the process.
